2172800.name: Defi Gravity
2172800.description:
High octane racing game with no speed limit. Defy the laws of physics in this thrilling game that takes competition to its limits.

Mind bending race tracks set in highly imaginative setting.

Jump into your favourite gravity ship and explore the extra-terrestrial surroundings, from cyberpunk cities to spiral mountain roads and mesmerizing frozen highways. Be the best & challenge other AI players to gain in game currencies (MXS and GRAVITY).

Use these currencies to customise your ship thanks to detailed tuning options, that will help you reveal the full potential.
